name: memory-pi
description: Local vector memory backbone for the pi ecosystem

scripts.start: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "CHROMA,OLLAMA,SERVER" -c "yellow,blue,green" "node scripts/start-service.js chroma 8000 \"chroma run --path ./data/chroma\"" "node scripts/start-service.js ollama 11434 \"ollama serve\"" "node dist/index.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "CHROMA,OLLAMA,SERVER,UI" -c "yellow,blue,green,magenta" "node scripts/start-service.js chroma 8000 \"chroma run --path ./data/chroma\"" "node scripts/start-service.js ollama 11434 \"ollama serve\"" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:ui"
